questions.q: According to projections from CBC News, Prime Minister Mark Carney secured a majority government following a byelection victory in which city?
Prime Minister Mark Carney announced his government will temporarily suspend what federal tax starting on April 20, 2026?
options: The federal excise tax on gas and diesel
The federal carbon tax on home heating
The federal sales tax on groceries
The capital gains tax on primary residences
questions.correctText: The federal excise tax on gas and diesel

questions.q: Vancouver Mayor Ken Sim announced he is bringing forward a motion to council aiming to bring an expansion team from which professional sports league to the city?
While meeting with Prime Minister Mark Carney, Finland's President Alexander Stubb stated he believes Canada could eventually become a part of what international organization?
options: The Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN)
The Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC)

questions.q: An Ontario resident was recently charged by the RCMP after seven fake passports were found concealed inside what item at Toronto Pearson International Airport?
